articles.headline: Anthropic Launches Claude Opus 4.1 with Advanced Coding Capabilities
articles.summary: Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.1, an incremental upgrade to Claude Opus 4 that significantly improves multi-file code refactoring and large codebase analysis. The model achieved an industry-leading 74.5% on the SWE-bench Verified benchmark, demonstrating substantial improvements in coding performance.

articles.headline: Google DeepMind Releases Genie 3, Revolutionary World Model for Interactive 3D Simulations
articles.summary: Google DeepMind unveiled Genie 3, a foundation world model that generates interactive 3D environments at 720p resolution and 24 frames per second, vastly surpassing its predecessor Genie 2. The model demonstrates unprecedented physical consistency and intuitive understanding of real-world physics without explicit programming.

articles.headline: OpenAI Advances GPT-5 Series with Enhanced Reasoning and Agent-Based Workflows
articles.summary: OpenAI released GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.4 models that combine advanced reasoning, coding, and agent-based workflows with computer-use capabilities enabling direct application interaction. These models support complex enterprise tasks including data analysis and spreadsheet modeling across ChatGPT Health and other integrated services.
